visual.name: pbiBulletChart
visual.description: Stephen Few bullet chart with actual vs target and qualitative colour bands for OptiStock dashboard.

en-US.Visual_Short_Description: Stephen Few bullet chart with actual vs target and qualitative colour bands.
en-US.Visual_Long_Description: Horizontal and vertical bullet charts with configurable qualitative range bands, target markers, and value labels. Supports multiple rows with scrolling.

dataRoles.name: category
dataRoles.description: Row label (e.g. Beat name or Battery code)

dataRoles.name: maximum
dataRoles.description: Full scale maximum (optional, auto-calculated if omitted)
